name: ronin
description: Ronin - AI Agent Master Controller (Web + Desktop)

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../desktop && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:web && npm run build:desktop
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:web && npm run test:desktop
